LanguageData.VFEFactory_AssembleComponent.label: make a component
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BlueGel_To_Hexagel.descriptio: Make a crystallized cube of hexagel by compressing blue gel under high pressure.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BlueGel_To_Hexagel.label: compress blue gel into hexagel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_Make_HexagelCore.description: Craft hexagel cores using hexagel and uranium as a stabilizer.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_Make_HexagelCore.label: make hexagel cores
LanguageData.VFEFactory_RefineUraniumCrystals.descrip: Extract useful materials from unrefined uranium crystals.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_RefineUraniumCrystals.label: refine uranium crystals
